elevator_parameter_modes._documentation: This object is not used by the application logic — it is a label map so you can see which keys matter for elevator_wait_floor_buttons vs elevator_predefined_floor. It is preserved when you run cfg save from the technician menu.

legend.wait_floor_sense: elevator_wait_floor_cab_sense sense (default): read elevator_floor_input_pins, log floor, pulse matching dispatch
legend.wait_floor_ignore: elevator_wait_floor_cab_sense ignore: leave elevator_floor_input_pins empty; no cab GPIO; no floor log/dispatch from software
legend.both: Used in either elevator mode (or as fallback when lists are empty)

device.keypad_operation_mode: both — set to elevator_wait_floor_buttons or elevator_predefined_floor (or other access modes)
device.elevator_floor_wait_timeout: wait_floor — how long enable relays stay on after PIN
device.elevator_wait_floor_cab_sense: wait_floor — sense (default) or ignore (sub-mode for cab GPIO)
device.elevator_floor_input_pins: wait_floor + sense only — BCM cab floor inputs (must be empty when ignore)
device.elevator_dispatch_pulse_duration: both — default length for dispatch pulse
device.elevator_floor_dispatch_pulse_durations: both — per-index durations when gpio.elevator_floor_dispatch_pins is set
device.elevator_enable_pulse_duration: predefined only — pulse length for gpio.elevator_predefined_enable_pins (ignored in wait_floor mode)

gpio.elevator_dispatch_relay_pin: both — single dispatch relay if elevator_floor_dispatch_pins is empty
gpio.elevator_enable_relay_pin: wait_floor — legacy one relay for all floors; use only if elevator_wait_floor_enable_pins is empty
gpio.elevator_enable_active_low: wait_floor (enable relays) and predefined (predefined enable relay)
gpio.elevator_floor_dispatch_pins: both — wait_floor+sense: one per elevator_floor_input_pins; wait_floor+ignore: one per wait-floor enable channel; predefined: optional when no cab inputs
gpio.elevator_wait_floor_enable_pins: wait_floor — ground-return relays; sense: one per elevator_floor_input_pins; ignore: one per enabled floor (no cab inputs)
gpio.elevator_predefined_enable_pins: predefined — relay that simulates the floor call (at most one)
